section_text_parts: Notice that these parameters are passed directly to the path operation decorator , not to your path operation function .
tutorial/path-operation-configuration::s.section_text: Notice that these parameters are passed directly to the path operation decorator , not to your path operation function .

tutorial/path-operation-configuration::s.title: Technical Details
section_text_parts: You could also use from starlette import status .
FastAPI provides the same starlette.status as fastapi.status just as a convenience for you, the developer. But it comes directly from Starlette.
tutorial/path-operation-configuration::s.section_text:
You could also use from starlette import status .

FastAPI provides the same starlette.status as fastapi.status just as a convenience for you, the developer. But it comes directly from Starlette.

section_text_parts: Notice that response_description refers specifically to the response, the description refers to the path operation in general.
tutorial/path-operation-configuration::s.section_text: Notice that response_description refers specifically to the response, the description refers to the path operation in general.

section_text_parts: OpenAPI specifies that each path operation requires a response description.
So, if you don't provide one, FastAPI will automatically generate one of "Successful response".
tutorial/path-operation-configuration::s.section_text:
OpenAPI specifies that each path operation requires a response description.

So, if you don't provide one, FastAPI will automatically generate one of "Successful response".
